record_unit: One gas adsorption measurement for one MOF material under one defined set of conditions.

fields.name: record_id
fields.description: Stable unique identifier for one adsorption measurement point.

fields.name: MOF_name
fields.description: Reported or normalized name of the MOF material.

fields.name: metal_node
fields.description: Metal node or inorganic secondary building unit when reported.

fields.name: organic_linker
fields.description: Organic linker or ligand used in the MOF.

fields.name: chemical_formula
fields.description: Chemical formula as reported by the source.

fields.name: CSD_refcode
fields.description: Cambridge Structural Database refcode or related structural identifier.

fields.name: topology
fields.description: MOF topology/net identifier when available.

fields.name: surface_area_BET_m2_g
fields.description: BET surface area in square meters per gram.

fields.name: pore_volume_cm3_g
fields.description: Pore volume in cubic centimeters per gram.

fields.name: pore_size_A
fields.description: Representative pore diameter or pore limiting diameter in angstrom.

fields.name: gas_type
fields.description: Adsorbate gas formula or gas pair for selectivity records.

fields.name: gas_name
fields.description: Human-readable gas name.

fields.name: temperature
fields.description: Measurement temperature.

fields.name: pressure
fields.description: Measurement pressure.

fields.name: measurement_type
fields.description: Kind of adsorption result, such as capacity, selectivity, working_capacity, or heat_of_adsorption.

fields.name: measurement_method
fields.description: Experimental method used to obtain the value.

fields.name: activation_conditions
fields.description: Sample activation or degassing conditions before measurement.

fields.name: capacity_value
fields.description: Numeric adsorption capacity or result value.

fields.name: capacity_unit
fields.description: Unit for capacity_value.
fields.normalization_rule: Preserve reported unit during extraction; convert to target units during cleaning.

fields.name: selectivity
fields.description: Gas selectivity value if the record reports selectivity instead of or in addition to capacity.

fields.name: error_bar
fields.description: Reported uncertainty for capacity_value or selectivity.

fields.name: isotherm_id
fields.description: Identifier linking multiple pressure points from the same isotherm.

fields.name: DOI
fields.description: DOI for the source publication when available.

fields.name: publication_year
fields.description: Publication year of the source.

fields.name: source_id
fields.description: Identifier linking the record to specs/source_map.json.

fields.name: source_type
fields.description: Category of source: scientific_paper, supplementary_material, database, aggregator, github_repository, or public_dataset.

fields.name: source_url
fields.description: URL, DOI URL, or landing page for the source.

fields.name: source_database
fields.description: Name of the database or repository from which the record was obtained.

fields.name: supplementary_file
fields.description: Supplementary filename, table, figure, or archive member used for extraction.

fields.name: extraction_method
fields.description: How the record was obtained, e.g. database_api, pdf_table, manual_pdf, digitized_figure, supplementary_csv.

fields.name: extraction_confidence
fields.description: Confidence in extracted values: high, medium, low, or unknown.

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Free-text notes, caveats, aliases, or provenance details.
fields.example: Pressure converted from 100 kPa; MOF alias reported as CuBTC.
